News

Local MP Alan Mak proposes new law to expand number of Banking Hubs

Thursday, 30 April, 2026
Local MP Alan Mak has proposed a new law to expand Britain’s network of Banking Hubs so that customers have more access to face-to-face banking services. He spoke in the House of Commons to introduce his In-Person Banking Services Bill, which aims to build on the success of his campaign to deliver a Banking Hub in Havant town centre. Over the past decade more than 6,000 bank branches have closed...
